title: eryngium supinum
intro: Eryngium supinum, also known as Sea Holly or Blue Devil, is a type of flowering plant in the parsley family (Apiaceae), native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Eryngium supinum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Eryngium supinum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
